docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, SUZANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWICK, PATRICK DEFENDANT WAS NOT INVOLVED WITH THE TRANSACTIONS PLAINTIFF COMPLAINS OF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION (PROVISIONALLY) AS OF DEC-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT SUZANNE KING. DEFENDANT PATRICK SOUTHWICK IS NOT PRESENT. JURISDICTIONALLY THE NAMED DEFENDANT MAY NOT BE APPROPRIATE FOR SMALL CLAIMS COURT. THIS MATTER IS UNDER JUDICIAL REVIEW. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED IN CASE 18-859168.
